# Yaccarino’s Cries & Sotheby’s $1B Bid

Zaz’s Fresh Hell, D.C. Media Murmurs, Harris’s TikTok Election
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

Media Murmurs, Harris’s TikTok Election** | | Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon dispatch from Puck HQ.     First up today, **William D. Cohan** decodes **Linda Yaccarino** ’s bizarro plea to advertisers to return to X, and evaluates whether her “open letter” to potential commercial partners will have *any* impact in the wake of **Elon Musk** ’s decidedly counterproductive appearance at the DealBook conference late last year.     Plus, below the fold: **Marion Maneker** reveals why Sotheby’s owner **Patrick Drahi** needed a billion-dollar capital infusion from Abu Dhabi’s sovereign wealth fund. On *The Town* , **Matt Belloni** gets LightShed analyst extraordinaire **Rich Greenfield** on the horn to assess the biggest losers of Hollywood’s Cable-pocalypse. On *Somebody’s Gotta Win* , **Tara Palmeri** is joined by Politico’s **Meridith McGraw** to make sense of **Kellyanne Conway** ’s potential boomerang back to Mar-a-Lago. And on *The Powers That Be* , **Jon Kelly** reunites with **Peter Hamby** for a check-in on the **Harris** - **Trump** TikTok election, an assessment of **David Zaslav** ’s nightmare *du jour* , and to discuss how D.C. misinterpreted the Axios news. | |  | | [Blink Twice, Linda…](https://email.puck.) | | WILLIAM D. COHAN | | News and notes on Elon Musk and Linda Yaccarino’s bizarro world “war” on the advertising community. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Drahi’s Billion-Dollar Question](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dSUl9aUDdxaktacG1pYXNlOU4xaz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3Mvc290aGVieXMtcGxhbi1mb3ItaXRzLTEtYmlsbGlvbi1pbmZ1c2lvbi8_) | | MARION MANEKER | | Caught between a slowing art market and $1.88 billion in debt, Sotheby’s owner finally landed the investment he needed to see his art world adventure through. What will he do with the money? | |  | | [The Biggest Losers of Hollywood’s Cable-pocalypse](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dSUl9aUDdxaktacG1pYXNlOU4xaz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL3RoZS1iaWdnZXN0LWxvc2Vycy1vZi1ob2xseXdvb2RzLWNhYmxlLXBvY2FseXBzZS8_) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | Matt is joined by LightShed media analyst Rich Greenfield to discuss the newest and most dire stage of the linear TV meltdown, with multibillion-dollar write-offs at Warner Bros. Discovery and Paramount. They get into why these companies are only now acknowledging their TV assets are such a problem, debate whether or not anyone should be paying billions of dollars for NBA rights in 2025, and whether David Zaslav is on the hot seat. | |  | | [Meridith McGraw on Trump’s Resurrection, Plus a Kellyanne Comeback?](https://email.puck.) | | TARA PALMERI | | Tara is joined by Politico national political correspondent Meridith McGraw to share their reactions to Donald Trump’s wild Mar-a-Lago press conference, and Kellyanne Conway's possible return to Team Trump. They dive into Meridith’s new book, ‘Trump in Exile,’ which shines a light on Trump’s political comeback from the January 6 debacle and the calculated machinations of his inner circle. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Media Monday: Zaz Truthers & Axiosology](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dSUl9aUDdxaktacG1pYXNlOU4xaz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL21lZGlhLW1vbmRheS16YXotdHJ1dGhlcnMtYXhpb3NvbG9neS8_) | | PETER HAMBY & JON KELLY | | Jon Kelly joins Peter Hamby for a check-in on the Harris-Trump TikTok election, an assessment of David Zaslav's nightmare du jour, and Washington's misread of the Axios news. | | |  | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dSUl9aUDdxaktacG1pYXNlOU4xaz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
